title: Leaving Dressrosa — Part 3
description: Luffy’s allies prepare to escape while Fujitora and the Marines make their move.
scene: On pages 14–18, Luffy, Trafalgar Law, Rebecca, King Riku, Kyros deal with the aftermath of Dressrosa, with the Marines, allies, and citizens responding to the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: She may be teased for it at some point, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Rebecca is still a child.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I can't let a moment's passion preclude a lifetime of happiness for her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I've reasoned with King Riku as well.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Luffy definitely is not buying any of it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: ZORO- Senbai!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: WAAH, Luffy-Senbai! So you're awake! Good morning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: capital- Ah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Lord kyros! This is Leo!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Guoooaah! With 5 members of the Straw Hat crew together in one place, it's too bright for me to even see!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: A laser beam of epicness!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: If I ever happen to one day meet the Straw Hat all-stars, I may well go blind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Quit babbling and tell us why you came here in the first place!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: There's some movement in the Marine Encampment!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Things will start getting dangerous here soon!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral Grand Staff Officer Tsuru and...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Former Fleet Admiral Sengoku have both arrived!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: o-tsuru and Sen- Goku!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Why the hell are such big- shots coming all the way out here!? Go back home, damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: sengoku ...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Leo! What's the situation over there!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Ah! Well, those Marines are on the move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: And so...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Destiny wills.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: All Marine Squads !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: The Straw Hat crew, and Trafalgar Law,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: As well as those crime- Inals being housed in the Royal Palace...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Capture them all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Roger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Do not worry! I shall take respon- ability for everything!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: admiral! We haven't received permission to enter the palace from the King!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: The Marines are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: GyaAA AAAAH! It's all over!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Why are you all all all all all all all all all all all all all all all all all aflutter? We'd been prepared to leave from the beginning!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: We were just waiting for Luffy-Dono to awaken.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Yes! In fact, it is much stranger that it's taken them this long to finally mount their attack!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: All we still need is a ship.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: What are we gonna do without a ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Leo! Have you done what I asked!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: Yes! Everything, as you said!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: chicken-san! It looks like they're heading to the palace as well! The warriors are in danger!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Roger! Thanks for looking out, squirt!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: We've been keeping our own tabs...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Make way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: We're going to capture those pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Fighters
dialogue.text: What!? Lucy, too!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: on the Marines' movements! ain't nothing to fear!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Luffy- Senpai, everyone! I will guide you! Just keep run- ning east, straight for the harbor!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: So that you could wake at your will,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: And leave this country when you wished,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Your Allies have been, and still are..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Waiting on Standby...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: At points along your route!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: There's a ship in the Eastern Harbor as well!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: You are the man!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: We let the sunny go on without us, so we're in a bit of a bind!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: Of course! we're all fighters on the same team!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Like we'd let them take our King now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: There they are! Capture them!

summary: This part follows the consequences of Dressrosa’s liberation and shows how the victory changes the country and the wider world.
